title: Set 4: The Space Museum 🚀
instructions_en: READ THE STORY. CHOOSE A WORD FROM THE BOX. WRITE THE CORRECT WORD NEXT TO NUMBERS 1–5. THERE IS ONE EXAMPLE.
story_segments: Yesterday, my class went on a trip to the
in the city centre. We went there to learn about space for our
project. When we arrived, we saw a huge silver

. It was so tall that it nearly touched the ceiling!

A man who was a real
talked to us about his job. He showed us a suit that people wear in space. He said it is very
and difficult to walk in. We also went into a dark room to see a show about the

like Mars and Jupiter.

I bought a small toy robot in the shop before we went home. I want to be a pilot when I grow up so I can fly to the moon!

title_question.prompt: Now choose the best name for the story. Write a letter:

options.text: A visit to the toy shop

explanations_vi: Học về không gian cho dự án môn khoa học (science).
Nhìn thấy một tên lửa (rocket) bạc khổng lồ.
Một phi hành gia (astronaut) thật kể về công việc của ông ấy.
Bộ đồ phi hành gia rất nặng (heavy) và khó đi lại.
Xem chương trình về các hành tinh (planets) như Sao Hỏa và Sao Mộc.
Tiêu đề A (Học về các vì sao) là tiêu đề phù hợp nhất.
